<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>StrandLab — Wireless Hair Straightener Brush</title>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{--cream:#faf7f2;--sand:#e8ddd0;--warm-dark:#1c1410;--mocha:#6b4f3a;--blush:#e8c5b0;--gold:#c9965a;--text:#2d1f14;--muted:#9a8070;}
  *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--cream);color:var(--text);overflow-x:hidden;}
  body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");pointer-events:none;z-index:1000;opacity:0.4;}
  nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:0.7rem 4rem;background:rgba(250,247,242,0.95);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(107,79,58,0.1);}
  .logo-img{height:54px;width:auto;object-fit:contain;}
  .nav-links{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;list-style:none;}
  .nav-links a{text-decoration:none;color:var(--muted);font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color 0.2s;}
  .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--warm-dark);}
  .nav-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.8rem;}
  .cart-btn{background:var(--warm-dark);color:var(--cream);border:none;padding:0.6rem 1.4rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:0.8rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.2s,transform 0.15s;position:relative;}
  .cart-btn:hover{background:var(--mocha);transform:scale(1.02);}
  .cart-count{position:absolute;top:-6px;right:-6px;background:var(--gold);color:white;border-radius:50%;width:18px;height:18px;font-size:0.65rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:600;}
  .admin-btn{background:transparent;border:1.5px solid var(--mocha);color:var(--mocha);padding:0.5rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:0.75rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;}
  .admin-btn:hover{background:var(--mocha);color:white;}
  .hero{min-height:100vh;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;padding-top:74px;overflow:hidden;}
  .hero-left{display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:5rem 3rem 5rem 6rem;}
  .hero-tag{display:inline-block;background:var(--blush);color:var(--mocha);font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:0.4rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;margin-bottom:1.8rem;animation:fadeUp 0.7s ease both;}
  .hero-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(2.6rem,4.5vw,4.4rem);line-height:1.1;font-weight:700;color:var(--warm-dark);margin-bottom:1.2rem;animation:fadeUp 0.7s 0.1s ease both;}
  .hero-title em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold);}
  .hero-sub{font-size:1rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;max-width:420px;margin-bottom:2.4rem;font-weight:300;animation:fadeUp 0.7s 0.2s ease both;}
  .hero-ctas{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;animation:fadeUp 0.7s 0.3s ease both;}
  .btn-primary{background:var(--warm-dark);color:var(--cream);border:none;padding:0.95rem 2.2rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:0.9rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.25s;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;}
  .btn-primary:hover{background:var(--mocha);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(107,79,58,0.25);}
  .btn-outline{background:transparent;color:var(--warm-dark);border:1.5px solid var(--warm-dark);padding:0.95rem 2.2rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:0.9rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.25s;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;}
  .btn-outline:hover{background:var(--warm-dark);color:var(--cream);transform:translateY(-2px);}
  .hero-stats{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;margin-top:3rem;padding-top:2rem;border-top:1px solid var(--sand);animation:fadeUp 0.7s 0.4s ease both;}
  .stat-num{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--warm-dark);}
  .stat-label{font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;margin-top:0.2rem;}
  .hero-right{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f5e6de 0%,#edd5c8 50%,#e0c4b4 100%);position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;animation:fadeIn 1s 0.2s ease both;}
  .hero-img{height:88%;max-height:700px;width:auto;object-fit:contain;animation:float 5s ease-in-out infinite;filter:drop-shadow(0 30px 50px rgba(28,20,16,0.15));position:relative;z-index:2;}
  .badge-float{position:absolute;background:white;border-radius:16px;padding:0.6rem 1rem;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);font-size:0.78rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:500;color:var(--warm-dark);white-space:nowrap;z-index:3;}
  .badge-float.b1{top:12%;right:5%;animation:float2 3.5s ease-in-out infinite;}
  .badge-float.b2{bottom:28%;left:3%;animation:float2 4s 0.8s ease-in-out infinite;}
  .badge-float.b3{bottom:10%;right:6%;animation:float2 3.8s 0.4s ease-in-out infinite;}
  .hero-bg-circle{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);}
  .hero-bg-circle.c1{width:400px;height:400px;top:-100px;right:-100px;}
  .hero-bg-circle.c2{width:250px;height:250px;bottom:-60px;left:-60px;}
  .marquee-section{background:var(--warm-dark);padding:1.1rem 0;overflow:hidden;}
  .marquee-track{display:flex;animation:marquee 30s linear infinite;white-space:nowrap;}
  .marquee-item{color:var(--cream);font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:0 2rem;opacity:0.8;}
  .marquee-dot{color:var(--gold);opacity:1;}
  .features{padding:6rem 6rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:5rem;align-items:center;}
  .features-text h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,3.5vw,3rem);font-weight:700;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:1.5rem;color:var(--warm-dark);}
  .features-text p{color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:2rem;max-width:480px;}
  .feature-pills{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.6rem;}
  .pill{background:var(--sand);color:var(--mocha);padding:0.5rem 1.1rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:500;}
  .features-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.2rem;}
  .feat-card{background:white;border-radius:20px;padding:1.8rem;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(28,20,16,0.05);transition:transform 0.2s,box-shadow 0.2s;}
  .feat-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(28,20,16,0.1);}
  .feat-card:nth-child(2),.feat-card:nth-child(4){margin-top:1.5rem;}
  .feat-icon{font-size:1.8rem;margin-bottom:0.8rem;display:block;}
  .feat-card h4{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:0.4rem;color:var(--warm-dark);}
  .feat-card p{font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;font-weight:300;}
  .lifestyle{padding:4rem 6rem;background:#f5f0ea;}
  .lifestyle-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3vw,2.4rem);font-weight:700;color:var(--warm-dark);margin-bottom:0.4rem;}
  .lifestyle-sub{color:var(--muted);font-weight:300;margin-bottom:2.5rem;font-size:0.95rem;}
  .lifestyle-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.2rem;}
  .lifestyle-img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:3/4;object-fit:cover;border-radius:20px;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(28,20,16,0.08);transition:transform 0.3s;}
  .lifestyle-img:hover{transform:scale(1.02);}
  .specs{padding:5rem 6rem;}
  .specs-inner{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:center;}
  .specs h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3vw,2.4rem);font-weight:700;color:var(--warm-dark);margin-bottom:0.5rem;}
  .specs-sub{color:var(--muted);font-weight:300;margin-bottom:2rem;font-size:0.9rem;line-height:1.6;}
  .spec-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.7rem;}
  .spec-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:0.7rem 1.1rem;background:white;border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(28,20,16,0.04);}
  .spec-key{font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:500;}
  .spec-val{font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--warm-dark);text-align:right;}
  .specs-img{width:100%;border-radius:24px;object-fit:cover;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(28,20,16,0.12);}
  .products{padding:5rem 6rem;background:#f5f0ea;}
  .section-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:3rem;}
  .section-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3vw,2.6rem);font-weight:700;color:var(--warm-dark);}
  .section-title span{display:block;font-style:italic;color:var(--gold);}
  .products-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.8rem;}
  .product-card{background:white;border-radius:24px;overflow:hidden;transition:transform 0.25s,box-shadow 0.25s;}
  .product-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:0 20px 48px rgba(28,20,16,0.12);}
  .product-img-wrap{height:240px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:#f9f5f0;}
  .product-img-wrap img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform 0.4s;}
  .product-card:hover .product-img-wrap img{transform:scale(1.05);}
  .product-badge{position:absolute;top:1rem;left:1rem;background:var(--warm-dark);color:var(--cream);font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:0.3rem 0.8rem;border-radius:100px;z-index:1;}
  .product-badge.gold{background:var(--gold);}
  .product-info{padding:1.5rem;}
  .product-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--warm-dark);margin-bottom:0.3rem;}
  .product-desc{font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:0.8rem;font-weight:300;line-height:1.5;}
  .color-label{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;margin-bottom:0.4rem;}
  .color-swatches{display:flex;gap:0.4rem;margin-bottom:1rem;}
  .swatch{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;border:2.5px solid transparent;transition:all 0.15s;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);}
  .swatch:hover{transform:scale(1.2);}
  .swatch.active{border-color:var(--warm-dark);transform:scale(1.1);}
  .product-footer{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
  .price{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--warm-dark);}
  .price-currency{font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--muted);margin-left:0.2rem;}
  .add-btn{background:var(--warm-dark);color:white;border:none;width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;font-size:1.2rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
  .add-btn:hover{background:var(--gold);transform:scale(1.1);}
  .out-of-stock-tag{font-size:0.72rem;color:#e05050;font-weight:500;margin-top:0.2rem;}
  .price-original{font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--muted);text-decoration:line-through;margin-left:0.3rem;font-weight:400;}
  .sale-tag{display:inline-block;background:#e8f5e9;color:#2e7d32;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:700;padding:0.2rem 0.55rem;border-radius:100px;margin-left:0.4rem;letter-spacing:0.04em;}
  .price-row{display:flex;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.1rem;}
  .how{padding:6rem 6rem;text-align:center;}
  .how h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,3.5vw,2.8rem);font-weight:700;color:var(--warm-dark);margin-bottom:1rem;}
  .how-sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:1rem;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:4rem;}
  .steps{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2rem;position:relative;}
  .steps::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:32px;left:12.5%;right:12.5%;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--sand),var(--sand),transparent);}
  .step{position:relative;z-index:1;}
  .step-num{width:64px;height:64px;background:white;border:2px solid var(--sand);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);margin:0 auto 1.5rem;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(28,20,16,0.08);}
  .step h4{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--warm-dark);margin-bottom:0.5rem;}
  .step p{font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;font-weight:300;}
  .testimonials{padding:5rem 6rem;background:var(--warm-dark);}
  .testimonials .section-title{color:var(--cream);}
  .testimonials .section-title span{color:var(--gold);}
  .testimonials-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem;margin-top:3rem;}
  .testi-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:20px;padding:2rem;transition:background 0.2s;}
  .testi-card:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}
  .testi-stars{color:var(--gold);font-size:0.85rem;margin-bottom:1rem;}
  .testi-text{color:rgba(250,247,242,0.8);font-size:0.9rem;line-height:1.7;font-weight:300;font-style:italic;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
  .testi-author{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.8rem;}
  .testi-avatar{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;color:white;}
  .testi-name{font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--cream);}
  .testi-location{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--muted);}
  .cta-banner{padding:6rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--blush) 0%,var(--sand) 100%);text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
  .cta-banner::before{content:'';position:absolute;width:500px;height:500px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);top:-200px;right:-100px;}
  .cta-banner::after{content:'';position:absolute;width:300px;height:300px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);bottom:-100px;left:-80px;}
  .cta-banner h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem);font-weight:700;color:var(--warm-dark);margin-bottom:1rem;position:relative;z-index:1;}
  .cta-banner p{color:var(--mocha);font-size:1rem;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:2.5rem;position:relative;z-index:1;}
  .cta-banner .btn-primary{position:relative;z-index:1;}
  footer{background:var(--warm-dark);color:var(--cream);padding:4rem 6rem 2rem;}
  .footer-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:3rem;margin-bottom:3rem;}
  .footer-logo{height:55px;width:auto;object-fit:contain;margin-bottom:1rem;display:block;filter:brightness(10);opacity:0.85;}
  .footer-brand p{font-size:0.82rem;color:rgba(250,247,242,0.5);line-height:1.7;font-weight:300;max-width:280px;}
  .footer-col h5{font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
  .footer-col ul{list-style:none;}
  .footer-col li{margin-bottom:0.6rem;}
  .footer-col a{color:rgba(250,247,242,0.5);text-decoration:none;font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:300;transition:color 0.2s;}
  .footer-col a:hover{color:var(--cream);}
  .footer-bottom{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);padding-top:1.5rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
  .footer-bottom p{font-size:0.75rem;color:rgba(250,247,242,0.3);}
  .cart-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(28,20,16,0.5);z-index:500;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity 0.3s;}
  .cart-overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;}
  .cart-sidebar{position:fixed;top:0;right:0;bottom:0;width:430px;background:var(--cream);z-index:501;transform:translateX(100%);transition:transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:-20px 0 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);}
  .cart-sidebar.open{transform:translateX(0);}
  .cart-header{padding:1.5rem 2rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--sand);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;}
  .cart-header h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.3rem;color:var(--warm-dark);}
  .cart-close{background:none;border:none;font-size:1.5rem;cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted);line-height:1;}
  .cart-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
  .cart-items{padding:1.5rem 2rem;}
  .cart-item{display:flex;gap:1rem;padding:1rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--sand);}
  .cart-item-img{width:72px;height:72px;border-radius:12px;object-fit:cover;flex-shrink:0;background:#f5ede4;}
  .cart-item-info{flex:1;}
  .cart-item-name{font-weight:500;font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--warm-dark);margin-bottom:0.15rem;}
  .cart-item-variant{font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:0.3rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3rem;}
  .cart-item-price{font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--muted);}
  .cart-item-controls{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;margin-top:0.5rem;}
  .qty-btn{width:26px;height:26px;border:1px solid var(--sand);background:white;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all 0.15s;color:var(--warm-dark);}
  .qty-btn:hover{background:var(--warm-dark);color:white;border-color:var(--warm-dark);}
  .qty-num{font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:500;min-width:20px;text-align:center;}
  .cart-remove{background:none;border:none;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.75rem;margin-left:auto;padding:0.2rem 0.4rem;border-radius:4px;transition:color 0.15s;}
  .cart-remove:hover{color:#e53935;}
  .cart-empty{text-align:center;padding:3rem 2rem;color:var(--muted);}
  .cart-empty .empty-icon{font-size:3rem;margin-bottom:1rem;}
  .cart-empty p{font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:300;}
  .cod-form{padding:1.5rem 2rem;border-top:1px solid var(--sand);background:white;flex-shrink:0;}
  .cod-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3rem;background:#e8f5e9;color:#2e7d32;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.3rem 0.7rem;border-radius:100px;margin-bottom:0.8rem;}
  .cart-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:0.82rem;margin-bottom:0.4rem;}
  .cart-row.total{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--warm-dark);padding-top:0.6rem;border-top:1px solid var(--sand);margin-top:0.4rem;margin-bottom:1rem;}
  .cart-row span:first-child{color:var(--muted);}
  .cart-row.total span:first-child{color:var(--warm-dark);}
  .cod-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1rem;color:var(--warm-dark);margin-bottom:0.3rem;}
  .cod-sub{font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:1rem;}
  .cod-form input,.cod-form select,.cod-form textarea{width:100%;border:1.5px solid var(--sand);border-radius:10px;padding:0.65rem 0.9rem;font-size:0.85rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;color:var(--text);background:var(--cream);outline:none;transition:border-color 0.2s;margin-bottom:0.6rem;}
  .cod-form input:focus,.cod-form select:focus,.cod-form textarea:focus{border-color:var(--mocha);}
  .cod-form textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:52px;}
  .checkout-btn{width:100%;background:var(--warm-dark);color:var(--cream);border:none;padding:1rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:0.9rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;letter-spacing:0.05em;}
  .checkout-btn:hover{background:var(--mocha);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(107,79,58,0.3);}
  .order-confirm{padding:2rem;text-align:center;display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.8rem;}
  .order-confirm.show{display:flex;}
  .order-icon{font-size:3.5rem;}
  .order-confirm h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.4rem;color:var(--warm-dark);}
  .order-confirm p{font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;}
  .wa-btn{background:#25D366;color:white;border:none;padding:0.7rem 1.5rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:0.82rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;}
  .toast{position:fixed;bottom:2rem;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(80px);background:var(--warm-dark);color:var(--cream);padding:0.8rem 1.6rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:500;z-index:700;transition:transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);}
  .toast.show{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);}

  /* WHATSAPP FLOAT BUTTON */
  .wa-float{position:fixed;bottom:2rem;right:2rem;z-index:400;background:#25D366;color:white;border:none;border-radius:50%;width:58px;height:58px;font-size:1.6rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(37,211,102,0.45);cursor:pointer;transition:transform 0.2s,box-shadow 0.2s;text-decoration:none;}
  .wa-float:hover{transform:scale(1.1) translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 10px 32px rgba(37,211,102,0.5);}
  .wa-float-pulse{position:absolute;width:100%;height:100%;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(37,211,102,0.4);animation:waPulse 2.2s ease-out infinite;}
  @keyframes waPulse{0%{transform:scale(1);opacity:0.8;}100%{transform:scale(1.9);opacity:0;}}

  /* FAQ */
  .faq{padding:6rem 6rem;background:var(--cream);}
  .faq-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:3.5rem;}
  .faq-header h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3vw,2.6rem);font-weight:700;color:var(--warm-dark);margin-bottom:0.6rem;}
  .faq-header p{color:var(--muted);font-weight:300;font-size:0.95rem;}
  .faq-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;max-width:960px;margin:0 auto;}
  .faq-item{background:white;border-radius:16px;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(28,20,16,0.05);overflow:hidden;}
  .faq-q{width:100%;background:none;border:none;padding:1.2rem 1.5rem;text-align:left;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:0.88rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--warm-dark);cursor:pointer;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:1rem;line-height:1.4;}
  .faq-q:hover{color:var(--mocha);}
  .faq-chevron{font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--gold);transition:transform 0.25s;flex-shrink:0;}
  .faq-item.open .faq-chevron{transform:rotate(180deg);}
  .faq-a{max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height 0.3s ease,padding 0.3s ease;font-size:0.83rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;font-weight:300;padding:0 1.5rem;}
  .faq-item.open .faq-a{max-height:200px;padding:0 1.5rem 1.2rem;}

  /* REVIEWS SECTION */
  .reviews{padding:5rem 6rem;background:var(--warm-dark);}
  .reviews-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:3rem;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem;}
  .reviews-header .section-title{color:var(--cream);}
  .reviews-header .section-title span{color:var(--gold);}
  .reviews-summary{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1.2rem;}
  .reviews-avg{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:2.8rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--cream);line-height:1;}
  .reviews-avg-stars{color:var(--gold);font-size:0.9rem;margin-bottom:0.2rem;}
  .reviews-avg-count{font-size:0.75rem;color:rgba(250,247,242,0.4);margin-top:0.15rem;}
  .reviews-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.2rem;margin-bottom:3rem;}
  .review-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:20px;padding:1.8rem;transition:background 0.2s;}
  .review-card:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}
  .review-stars{color:var(--gold);font-size:0.85rem;margin-bottom:0.8rem;}
  .review-text{color:rgba(250,247,242,0.8);font-size:0.88rem;line-height:1.7;font-weight:300;font-style:italic;margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
  .review-author{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.8rem;}
  .review-avatar{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:700;color:white;flex-shrink:0;}
  .review-name{font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--cream);}
  .review-meta{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--muted);}
  .review-verified{display:inline-block;background:rgba(201,150,90,0.2);color:var(--gold);font-size:0.65rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.15rem 0.5rem;border-radius:100px;margin-left:0.4rem;letter-spacing:0.04em;}

  /* WRITE A REVIEW */
  .write-review{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:20px;padding:2rem;}
  .write-review h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--cream);margin-bottom:0.4rem;}
  .write-review p{font-size:0.78rem;color:rgba(250,247,242,0.45);margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
  .review-form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.8rem;margin-bottom:0.8rem;}
  .review-form-field{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.3rem;}
  .review-form-field label{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:rgba(250,247,242,0.4);}
  .review-form-field input,.review-form-field textarea,.review-form-field select{border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:10px;padding:0.65rem 0.9rem;font-size:0.85rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;color:var(--cream);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);outline:none;transition:border-color 0.2s;}
  .review-form-field input:focus,.review-form-field textarea:focus,.review-form-field select:focus{border-color:var(--gold);}
  .review-form-field textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:80px;}
  .review-form-field select option{background:var(--warm-dark);color:var(--cream);}
  .review-form-field.full{grid-column:1/-1;}
  .star-picker{display:flex;gap:0.3rem;margin-top:0.3rem;}
  .star-picker span{font-size:1.4rem;cursor:pointer;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);transition:color 0.15s,transform 0.1s;}
  .star-picker span.active,.star-picker span:hover{color:var(--gold);}
  .star-picker span:hover{transform:scale(1.2);}
  .submit-review-btn{background:var(--gold);color:var(--warm-dark);border:none;padding:0.8rem 2rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:0.88rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;margin-top:1rem;}
  .submit-review-btn:hover{background:#d4a864;transform:translateY(-1px);}
  .no-reviews-msg{text-align:center;color:rgba(250,247,242,0.3);font-size:0.88rem;padding:2rem;font-style:italic;}

  /* FOOTER SOCIAL ICONS */
  .social-links{display:flex;gap:0.8rem;margin-top:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .social-link{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);color:rgba(250,247,242,0.6);text-decoration:none;font-size:0.9rem;transition:all 0.2s;}
  .social-link:hover{background:var(--gold);color:white;transform:translateY(-2px);}
  .social-link svg{width:16px;height:16px;fill:currentColor;}
  .admin-login-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(28,20,16,0.75);z-index:900;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
  .admin-login-overlay.open{display:flex;}
  .admin-login-box{background:white;border-radius:24px;padding:2.5rem;width:330px;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);}
  .admin-login-box h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.4rem;color:var(--warm-dark);margin-bottom:0.4rem;}
  .admin-login-box p{font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
  .admin-login-box input{width:100%;border:1.5px solid var(--sand);border-radius:10px;padding:0.75rem 1rem;font-size:0.9rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;outline:none;margin-bottom:1rem;text-align:center;letter-spacing:0.08em;background:var(--cream);}
  .admin-login-box input:focus{border-color:var(--mocha);}
  .admin-login-btn{width:100%;background:var(--warm-dark);color:white;border:none;padding:0.85rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:0.9rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.2s;}
  .admin-login-btn:hover{background:var(--mocha);}
  .admin-login-cancel{background:none;border:none;color:var(--muted);font-size:0.8rem;cursor:pointer;margin-top:0.8rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;}
  .login-error{color:#e53935;font-size:0.78rem;margin-bottom:0.6rem;display:none;}
  .admin-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(28,20,16,0.6);z-index:800;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity 0.3s;}
  .admin-overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;}
  .admin-panel{position:fixed;top:0;right:0;bottom:0;width:600px;background:#fff;z-index:801;transform:translateX(100%);transition:transform 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:-20px 0 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);overflow-y:auto;}
  .admin-panel.open{transform:translateX(0);}
  .admin-header{padding:1.2rem 2rem;background:var(--warm-dark);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:2;}
  .admin-header h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--cream);}
  .admin-header p{font-size:0.7rem;color:rgba(250,247,242,0.5);margin-top:0.1rem;}
  .admin-header-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.8rem;}
  .admin-close{background:none;border:none;color:rgba(250,247,242,0.6);font-size:1.4rem;cursor:pointer;line-height:1;}
  .admin-logout{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border:none;color:rgba(250,247,242,0.7);font-size:0.72rem;padding:0.3rem 0.8rem;border-radius:100px;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;}
  .admin-body{padding:2rem;}
  .admin-section{margin-bottom:2.5rem;}
  .admin-section-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--warm-dark);margin-bottom:1rem;padding-bottom:0.5rem;border-bottom:2px solid var(--sand);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
  .notif-box{background:var(--cream);border-radius:16px;padding:1.4rem;border:1.5px solid var(--sand);}
  .notif-box label{font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--muted);display:block;margin-bottom:0.3rem;}
  .notif-box input{width:100%;border:1.5px solid var(--sand);border-radius:8px;padding:0.6rem 0.8rem;font-size:0.85rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;outline:none;margin-bottom:0.8rem;background:white;}
  .notif-box input:focus{border-color:var(--mocha);}
  .notif-hint{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:-0.5rem;margin-bottom:0.8rem;line-height:1.4;}
  .notif-save{background:var(--warm-dark);color:white;border:none;padding:0.5rem 1.2rem;border-radius:100px;font-size:0.8rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;cursor:pointer;}
  .pwd-toggle{background:none;border:1.5px solid var(--sand);color:var(--muted);padding:0.3rem 0.8rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.72rem;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;}
  .pwd-toggle:hover{border-color:var(--mocha);color:var(--mocha);}
  .pwd-form{background:#f9f5f0;border-radius:12px;padding:1rem;margin-top:0.8rem;display:none;}
  .pwd-form input{width:100%;border:1.5px solid var(--sand);border-radius:8px;padding:0.55rem 0.8rem;font-size:0.85rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;outline:none;margin-bottom:0.5rem;background:white;}
  .pwd-form button{background:var(--warm-dark);color:white;border:none;padding:0.5rem 1.2rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.8rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;cursor:pointer;margin-top:0.3rem;}
  .admin-orders-box{background:var(--cream);border-radius:16px;padding:1.4rem;border:1.5px solid var(--sand);max-height:340px;overflow-y:auto;}
  .order-row{padding:0.8rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--sand);font-size:0.82rem;}
  .order-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
  .order-row strong{color:var(--warm-dark);}
  .order-row .order-meta{color:var(--muted);margin-top:0.2rem;font-size:0.74rem;}
  .order-items-list{color:var(--mocha);margin-top:0.15rem;font-size:0.78rem;}
  .no-orders{text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:0.82rem;padding:1rem 0;}
  .order-status{display:inline-block;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.2rem 0.5rem;border-radius:100px;margin-left:0.5rem;background:#fff3e0;color:#e65100;}
  .clear-orders-btn{background:none;border:1.5px solid #eee;color:#ccc;padding:0.35rem 0.9rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.74rem;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;margin-top:0.8rem;transition:all 0.15s;display:block;}
  .clear-orders-btn:hover{border-color:#e53935;color:#e53935;}
  /* ADMIN REVIEWS */
  .admin-review-row{padding:0.8rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--sand);font-size:0.82rem;}
  .admin-review-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
  .admin-review-row strong{color:var(--warm-dark);}
  .admin-review-row .rev-meta{color:var(--muted);font-size:0.74rem;margin-top:0.15rem;}
  .admin-review-row .rev-text{color:var(--text);margin-top:0.25rem;font-style:italic;line-height:1.5;}
  .delete-review-btn{background:none;border:none;color:#ccc;font-size:0.75rem;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;margin-left:0.5rem;transition:color 0.15s;}
  .delete-review-btn:hover{color:#e53935;}
  .approve-review-btn{background:none;border:1.5px solid var(--sand);color:var(--muted);font-size:0.72rem;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;padding:0.2rem 0.6rem;border-radius:6px;margin-left:0.5rem;transition:all 0.15s;}
  .approve-review-btn:hover{border-color:#2e7d32;color:#2e7d32;}
  .rev-status-pending{font-size:0.65rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.15rem 0.5rem;border-radius:100px;background:#fff3e0;color:#e65100;margin-left:0.4rem;}
  .rev-status-approved{font-size:0.65rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.15rem 0.5rem;border-radius:100px;background:#e8f5e9;color:#2e7d32;margin-left:0.4rem;}
  /* ADMIN SOCIAL */
  .social-settings{background:var(--cream);border-radius:16px;padding:1.4rem;border:1.5px solid var(--sand);}
  .social-settings label{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--muted);display:block;margin-bottom:0.3rem;margin-top:0.8rem;}
  .social-settings label:first-child{margin-top:0;}
  .social-input-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;}
  .social-input-row span{font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;}
  .social-input-row input{flex:1;border:1.5px solid var(--sand);border-radius:8px;padding:0.55rem 0.8rem;font-size:0.83rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;outline:none;background:white;}
  .social-input-row input:focus{border-color:var(--mocha);}
  .admin-product-block{background:var(--cream);border-radius:16px;padding:1.4rem;margin-bottom:1rem;border:1.5px solid var(--sand);}
  .admin-product-block h4{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--warm-dark);margin-bottom:1rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
  .admin-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.8rem;margin-bottom:0.8rem;}
  .admin-field{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.3rem;}
  .admin-field label{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--muted);}
  .admin-field input,.admin-field select{border:1.5px solid var(--sand);border-radius:8px;padding:0.55rem 0.8rem;font-size:0.85rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;color:var(--text);background:white;outline:none;transition:border-color 0.2s;}
  .admin-field input:focus,.admin-field select:focus{border-color:var(--mocha);}
  .admin-field.full{grid-column:1/-1;}
  .colors-editor label{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--muted);display:block;margin-bottom:0.3rem;margin-top:0.8rem;}
  .colors-hint{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:0.5rem;}
  .color-row{background:white;border-radius:10px;padding:0.6rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem;border:1px solid var(--sand);}
  .color-row-top{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;margin-bottom:0.4rem;}
  .color-row input[type="color"]{width:34px;height:34px;border:2px solid var(--sand);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;padding:2px;background:white;flex-shrink:0;}
  .color-row input[type="text"]{flex:1;border:1.5px solid var(--sand);border-radius:7px;padding:0.45rem 0.6rem;font-size:0.8rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;outline:none;}
  .color-row input[type="number"]{width:60px;border:1.5px solid var(--sand);border-radius:7px;padding:0.45rem 0.4rem;font-size:0.8rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;outline:none;}
  .remove-color{background:none;border:none;color:#ccc;font-size:1.1rem;cursor:pointer;transition:color 0.15s;padding:0 0.2rem;}
  .remove-color:hover{color:#e53935;}
  .color-img-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;}
  .color-img-row input{flex:1;border:1.5px solid var(--sand);border-radius:7px;padding:0.4rem 0.6rem;font-size:0.72rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;outline:none;background:var(--cream);}
  .color-img-preview{width:48px;height:40px;border-radius:6px;object-fit:cover;border:1px solid var(--sand);flex-shrink:0;display:none;}
  .add-color-btn{background:none;border:1.5px dashed var(--sand);color:var(--muted);padding:0.4rem 1rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.78rem;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;transition:all 0.15s;margin-top:0.3rem;}
  .add-color-btn:hover{border-color:var(--mocha);color:var(--mocha);}
  .admin-save-btn{width:100%;background:var(--warm-dark);color:white;border:none;padding:0.9rem;border-radius:10px;font-size:0.9rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;margin-top:1.5rem;}
  .admin-save-btn:hover{background:var(--mocha);}
  .admin-add-product-btn{width:100%;background:none;border:2px dashed var(--sand);color:var(--muted);padding:0.9rem;border-radius:12px;font-size:0.85rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;margin-top:0.5rem;}
  .admin-add-product-btn:hover{border-color:var(--mocha);color:var(--mocha);}
  .delete-product-btn{background:none;border:none;color:#ccc;font-size:0.78rem;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;transition:color 0.15s;}
  .delete-product-btn:hover{color:#e53935;}
  @keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
  @keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;}to{opacity:1;}}
  @keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-12px);}}
  @keyframes float2{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(-1deg);}50%{transform:translateY(-8px) rotate(1deg);}}
  @keyframes marquee{from{transform:translateX(0);}to{transform:translateX(-50%);}}
  @media(max-width:1100px){nav{padding:0.7rem 2rem;}.nav-links{display:none;}.hero{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.hero-right{min-height:55vh;}.hero-left{padding:3rem 2rem;}.features{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding:4rem 2rem;gap:3rem;}.lifestyle{padding:4rem 2rem;}.lifestyle-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}.specs{padding:4rem 2rem;}.specs-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.specs-img{max-width:320px;}.products{padding:4rem 2rem;}.products-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}.how{padding:4rem 2rem;}.steps{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}.steps::before{display:none;}.faq{padding:4rem 2rem;}.faq-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.reviews{padding:4rem 2rem;}.reviews-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.review-form-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.testimonials{padding:4rem 2rem;}.testimonials-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.cta-banner{padding:4rem 2rem;}footer{padding:3rem 2rem 1.5rem;}.footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2rem;}.cart-sidebar{width:100%;max-width:430px;}.admin-panel{width:100%;max-width:600px;}}
  @media(max-width:600px){.products-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.hero-stats{gap:1.5rem;}.badge-float{display:none;}.lifestyle-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.reviews-header{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;}.wa-float{bottom:1.2rem;right:1.2rem;width:52px;height:52px;font-size:1.4rem;}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="StrandLab" class="logo-img"/>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#products">Shop</a></li>
    <li><a href="#features">Why StrandLab</a></li>
    <li><a href="#how">How It Works</a></li>
    <li><a href="#faq">FAQ</a></li>
    <li><a href="#reviews">Reviews</a></li>
  </ul>
  <div class="nav-right">
    <button class="admin-btn" onclick="promptAdmin()">⚙ Admin</button>
    <button class="cart-btn" onclick="toggleCart()">🛍 Cart<span class="cart-count" id="cartCount">0</span></button>
  </div>
</nav>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-left">

    <h1 class="hero-title">Salon-smooth hair,<br><em>no wires. No hassle.</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">The StrandLab Wireless Straightening Brush — 199 million negative ions, MCH rapid heating, and a cordless design that fits your life.</p>

    <div class="badge-float b3">💧 199M negative ions</div>

</section>

<section class="features" id="features">
  <div class="features-text">
    <h2>The science of silk — built into every bristle.</h2>
    <p>The StrandLab brush uses MCH heating and 199 million negative ions to smooth every strand without damage — all completely wireless.</p>
    <div class="feature-pills">
      <span class="pill">✓ 100% wireless</span><span class="pill">✓ Anti-scald 3D comb</span>
      <span class="pill">✓ 3 heat levels</span><span class="pill">✓ Type-C charging</span><span class="pill">✓ 199M negative ions</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="features-grid">
    <div class="feat-card"><span class="feat-icon">⚡</span><h4>MCH Rapid Heat</h4><p>Advanced MCH technology reaches 200°C in just 30 seconds — ready every morning.</p></div>
    <div class="feat-card"><span class="feat-icon">💧</span><h4>199M Negative Ions</h4><p>Seals the cuticle from root to tip for frizz-free, mirror-like shine that lasts all day.</p></div>
    <div class="feat-card"><span class="feat-icon">🛡</span><h4>Anti-Scald 3D Comb</h4><p>Inner + outer layer comb protects your scalp while smoothing hair evenly and gently.</p></div>
    <div class="feat-card"><span class="feat-icon">🔋</span><h4>Long Battery Life</h4><p>Large-capacity battery with Type-C charging. Wireless freedom — no strings attached.</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

        <div class="spec-row"><span class="spec-key">Heat-Up Time</span><span class="spec-val">~30 seconds</span></div>
        <div class="spec-row"><span class="spec-key">Negative Ions</span><span class="spec-val">199 million</span></div>
        <div class="spec-row"><span class="spec-key">Size</span><span class="spec-val">196mm / 7.7in — compact & portable</span></div>
        <div class="spec-row"><span class="spec-key">Colors</span><span class="spec-val">Pink · Purple · Black · White</span></div>
        <div class="spec-row"><span class="spec-key">Delivery</span><span class="spec-val">Lebanon — Cash on Delivery ($3 fee)</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

</section>

<section class="products" id="products">
  <div class="section-header">
    <h2 class="section-title">Pick Your Color<span>Same brush, your shade</span></h2>
  </div>
  <div class="products-grid" id="productsGrid"></div>
</section>

<section class="how" id="how">
  <h2>Simple enough to love daily.</h2>
  <p class="how-sub">Four steps to salon-smooth hair, every morning.</p>
  <div class="steps">
    <div class="step"><div class="step-num">1</div><h4>Charge up</h4><p>Plug in via Type-C. Charge fully before first use — battery lasts multiple sessions.</p></div>
    <div class="step"><div class="step-num">2</div><h4>Pick your heat</h4><p>Choose 160°C, 180°C, or 200°C. Wait just 30 seconds for it to reach temperature.</p></div>
    <div class="step"><div class="step-num">3</div><h4>Brush root to tip</h4><p>On 80%-dry hair, glide from roots to ends in smooth, steady strokes.</p></div>
    <div class="step"><div class="step-num">4</div><h4>Silk. Done.</h4><p>Under 10 minutes to frizz-free, shiny, smooth hair that holds all day long.</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FAQ -->
<section class="faq" id="faq">
  <div class="faq-header">
    <h2>Questions? We have answers.</h2>
    <p>Everything Lebanese customers ask before ordering.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="faq-grid" id="faqGrid">
    <div class="faq-item">
      <button class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">Is this brush original? Where is it from? <span class="faq-chevron">▼</span></button>
      <div class="faq-a">Yes — this is a genuine MCH ionic straightening brush sourced directly from the manufacturer. It uses real ceramic-coated bristles and produces 199 million negative ions. We stand behind every unit we sell.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-item">
      <button class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">How long does delivery take in Lebanon? <span class="faq-chevron">▼</span></button>
      <div class="faq-a">Delivery typically takes 1–3 business days depending on your area. Beirut and Mount Lebanon are usually next day. We call you to confirm before shipping.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-item">
      <button class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">What if it doesn't work or I'm not happy? <span class="faq-chevron">▼</span></button>
      <div class="faq-a">We offer a 7-day return policy if the brush is unused and in original condition. If there's a defect or malfunction, contact us via WhatsApp and we'll sort it out immediately — no hassle.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-item">
      <button class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">Do I pay before or after delivery? <span class="faq-chevron">▼</span></button>
      <div class="faq-a">You pay cash when the brush arrives at your door. No online payment, no card, no upfront fees. The only cost is $27 for the brush + $3 delivery fee, paid in USD cash on delivery.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-item">
      <button class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">Is it safe for damaged or chemically treated hair? <span class="faq-chevron">▼</span></button>
      <div class="faq-a">Yes. Use the lowest heat setting (160°C) for colour-treated, bleached, or fragile hair. The negative ion technology actually helps reduce damage compared to traditional straighteners by sealing the cuticle.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-item">
      <button class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">What's included in the box? <span class="faq-chevron">▼</span></button>
      <div class="faq-a">The box includes: the StrandLab wireless brush, a USB-C charging cable, 2 hair clips, a tail comb, and the instruction manual. Everything you need to get started right away.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-item">
      <button class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">How long does the battery last per charge? <span class="faq-chevron">▼</span></button>
      <div class="faq-a">Battery life depends on the heat setting used. On average you get 30–45 minutes of use per full charge, which is more than enough for a full styling session. Charges via Type-C in about 2 hours.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-item">
      <button class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">Can I use it on wet hair? <span class="faq-chevron">▼</span></button>
      <div class="faq-a">Do not use on soaking wet hair. Towel-dry your hair to about 80% dry first. Slightly damp hair actually gives the best results — smoother, faster, and with less heat damage.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- REVIEWS -->
<section class="reviews" id="reviews">
  <div class="reviews-header">
    <div class="section-title">Real reviews.<br><span>From real customers.</span></div>
    <div class="reviews-summary" id="reviewsSummary"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="reviews-grid" id="reviewsGrid"></div>

  <!-- WRITE A REVIEW -->
  <div class="write-review">
    <h3>Loved your StrandLab brush?</h3>
    <p>Share your experience — your review helps other Lebanese women decide.</p>
    <div class="review-form-grid">
      <div class="review-form-field">
        <label>Your Name *</label>
        <input type="text" id="revName" placeholder="e.g. Sara"/>
      </div>
      <div class="review-form-field">
        <label>City</label>
        <input type="text" id="revCity" placeholder="e.g. Beirut"/>
      </div>
      <div class="review-form-field">
        <label>Color You Bought</label>
        <select id="revColor">
          <option value="">Select color</option>
          <option>Pink</option>
          <option>Purple</option>
          <option>Black</option>
          <option>White</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="review-form-field">
        <label>Rating *</label>
        <div class="star-picker" id="starPicker">
          <span onclick="setStars(1)">★</span>
          <span onclick="setStars(2)">★</span>
          <span onclick="setStars(3)">★</span>
          <span onclick="setStars(4)">★</span>
          <span onclick="setStars(5)">★</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-form-field full">
        <label>Your Review *</label>
        <textarea id="revText" placeholder="Tell others what you think — does it work on your hair type? How fast does it heat up? Would you recommend it?"></textarea>
      </div>
    </div>
    <button class="submit-review-btn" onclick="submitReview()">Submit Review ✦</button>
  </div>
</section>

  <h2>Ready for your best hair day?</h2>
  <p>On sale now — was $32, only $27. Cash on delivery anywhere in Lebanon. Only $3 delivery fee.</p>

</section>
