<!-- CART -->
<div class="cart-overlay" id="cartOverlay" onclick="toggleCart()"></div>
<div class="cart-sidebar" id="cartSidebar">
  <div class="cart-header"><h3>Your Cart</h3><button class="cart-close" onclick="toggleCart()">✕</button></div>
  <div class="cart-body">
    <div class="cart-items" id="cartItems"></div>
    <div class="cod-form" id="codForm" style="display:none;">
      <div class="cod-badge">🚚 Cash on Delivery</div>
      <div class="cart-row"><span>Subtotal</span><span id="cartSubtotal">$0</span></div>
      <div class="cart-row"><span>Delivery fee</span><span>$3</span></div>
      <div class="cart-row total"><span>Total</span><span id="cartTotal">$0</span></div>
      <div class="cod-title">Complete Your Order</div>
      <div class="cod-sub">Fill your details — we'll call to confirm. Pay cash at your door.</div>
      <input type="text" id="codName" placeholder="Full Name *"/>
      <input type="tel" id="codPhone" placeholder="Phone Number * (e.g. 03 123 456)"/>
      <input type="text" id="codAddress" placeholder="Street / Area *"/>
      <select id="codCity"><option value="">Select City *</option><option>Beirut</option><option>Jounieh</option><option>Tripoli</option><option>Sidon (Saida)</option><option>Tyre (Sour)</option><option>Zahle</option><option>Batroun</option><option>Byblos (Jbeil)</option><option>Baalbek</option><option>Aley</option><option>Chouf</option><option>Other</option></select>
      <textarea id="codNotes" placeholder="Notes (optional)"></textarea>
      <button class="checkout-btn" onclick="placeOrder()">Place Order — Cash on Delivery 🚚</button>
    </div>
    <div class="order-confirm" id="orderConfirm">
      <div class="order-icon">✅</div>
      <h3>Order Placed!</h3>
      <p>We'll call you to confirm your delivery.<br>Pay cash when it arrives.</p>
      <button class="wa-btn" id="waShareBtn">📲 Send via WhatsApp</button>
      <button class="btn-primary" onclick="resetAfterOrder()" style="margin-top:0.3rem;font-size:0.85rem;padding:0.7rem 1.5rem;">Back to Shop</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ADMIN LOGIN -->
<div class="admin-login-overlay" id="adminLoginOverlay">
  <div class="admin-login-box">
    <h3>🔐 Admin Access</h3>
    <p>Enter your password to manage the store</p>
    <div class="login-error" id="loginError">Wrong password. Try again.</div>
    <input type="password" id="adminPwdInput" placeholder="••••••••" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')checkAdminPwd()"/>
    <button class="admin-login-btn" onclick="checkAdminPwd()">Enter Admin Panel</button><br>
    <button class="admin-login-cancel" onclick="closeAdminLogin()">Cancel</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ADMIN PANEL -->
<div class="admin-overlay" id="adminOverlay" onclick="closeAdmin()"></div>
<div class="admin-panel" id="adminPanel">
  <div class="admin-header">
    <div><h2>⚙ Admin Panel</h2><p>StrandLab store management</p></div>
    <div class="admin-header-right">
      <button class="admin-logout" onclick="logoutAdmin()">Log out</button>
      <button class="admin-close" onclick="closeAdmin()">✕</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="admin-body">
    <div class="admin-section">
      <div class="admin-section-title">🔔 Notifications &amp; Security
        <button class="pwd-toggle" onclick="togglePwdForm()">Change password</button>
      </div>
      <div class="notif-box">
        <label>Your WhatsApp Number (with country code)</label>
        <input type="tel" id="adminWaNum" placeholder="+961 3 123 456"/>
        <div class="notif-hint">When an order is placed, a WhatsApp message opens automatically for you to confirm with the customer.</div>
        <label>Zapier Webhook URL <span style="font-weight:400;text-transform:none;letter-spacing:0;">(optional)</span></label>
        <input type="url" id="adminWebhook" placeholder="https://hooks.zapier.com/hooks/catch/..."/>
        <div class="notif-hint">Connect to Zapier → auto-send orders to Google Sheets, email, delivery apps, or any system. Free at zapier.com</div>
        <button class="notif-save" onclick="saveNotifSettings()">Save Settings</button>
      </div>
      <div class="pwd-form" id="pwdForm">
        <input type="password" id="newPwd1" placeholder="New password"/>
        <input type="password" id="newPwd2" placeholder="Confirm new password"/>
        <button onclick="changePassword()">Update Password</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="admin-section">
      <div class="admin-section-title">📱 Social Media Links</div>
      <div class="social-settings">
        <label>WhatsApp Number (with country code — used for float button)</label>
        <div class="social-input-row"><span>💬</span><input type="tel" id="socialWa" placeholder="+961 3 123 456"/></div>
        <label>Instagram URL</label>
        <div class="social-input-row"><span>📸</span><input type="url" id="socialIg" placeholder="https://instagram.com/youraccount"/></div>
        <label>TikTok URL</label>
        <div class="social-input-row"><span>🎵</span><input type="url" id="socialTt" placeholder="https://tiktok.com/@youraccount"/></div>
        <label>Facebook URL</label>
        <div class="social-input-row"><span>👤</span><input type="url" id="socialFb" placeholder="https://facebook.com/yourpage"/></div>
        <button class="notif-save" style="margin-top:1rem;" onclick="saveSocialLinks()">Save Social Links</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="admin-section">
      <div class="admin-section-title">⭐ Customer Reviews <span style="font-family:'DM Sans';font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--muted);" id="pendingBadge"></span></div>
      <div class="admin-orders-box" id="adminReviews"><div class="no-orders">No reviews yet.</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="admin-section">
      <div class="admin-section-title">📦 Orders</div>
      <div class="admin-orders-box" id="adminOrders"><div class="no-orders">No orders yet.</div></div>
      <button class="clear-orders-btn" onclick="clearOrders()">🗑 Clear all orders</button>
    </div>
    <div class="admin-section">
      <div class="admin-section-title">🛍 Products</div>
      <div id="adminProductsList"></div>
      <button class="admin-add-product-btn" onclick="addProductBlock()">+ Add New Product</button>
    </div>
    <button class="admin-save-btn" onclick="saveAdminChanges()">💾 Save All Changes</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<script>
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ⚙️  SUPABASE CONFIG — paste your project URL + anon key here
//     Get these from: supabase.com → your project → Settings → API
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const SUPABASE_URL  = 'https://katfvjsjqqxkbxqopxvv.supabase.co'
const SUPABASE_ANON = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImthdGZ2anNqcXF4a2J4cW9weHZ2Iiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzU3NDU2MTUsImV4cCI6MjA5MTMyMTYxNX0.8gw97hB3aGs4DieFwbgNQVxHza2YOxkD8eeQ5FyupLw

'
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 🔧 STORE CONFIG — hardcoded for all users
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const DELIVERY_FEE    = 3;
const DEFAULT_PASSWORD = 'strandlab2025';
const STORE_WA_NUMBER = '96176043541';
const STORE_IG_URL    = 'https://www.instagram.com/strand__lab/';
const STORE_TT_URL    = 'https://www.tiktok.com/@strand_lab';
const STORE_FB_URL    = 'https://www.facebook.com/share/1AtV7fF57r/';
const GAS_WEBHOOK     = 'https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbzDIwmYcyQRMjDkNVjvp7mraQzIKoGAlglbzs335zHBv3wIJvccOuLqkfLgV0hot0V68g/exec';

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DEFAULT PRODUCTS (fallback when Supabase not yet configured)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const DEFAULT_PRODUCTS = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "StrandLab Wireless Brush",
    desc: "MCH ionic straightening brush. 199M negative ions, 30-sec heat-up, cordless.",
    price: 27,
    originalPrice: 32,
    badge: "On Sale",
    badgeClass: "gold",
    colors: [
      { name: "Pink", hex: "#f0b8c0", stock: 3, img: "data:image/jpeg;base64," },
      { name: "Purple", hex: "#b8aad4", stock: 3, img: "data:image/jpeg;base64," },
      { name: "Black", hex: "#2a1f2e", stock: 3, img: "data:image/jpeg;base64," },
      { name: "White", hex: "#e8e4de", stock: 2, img: "data:image/jpeg;base64," }
    ]
  }
];

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SUPABASE INIT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
let sb = null;
if (SUPABASE_URL && SUPABASE_ANON) {
  sb = supabase.createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON);
}
const DB_READY = !!sb;

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STATE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
let PRODUCTS = [...DEFAULT_PRODUCTS];
let cart = [];
let selectedColors = {};
let adminLoggedIn = false;
let selectedStars = 0;
const AVATAR_COLORS = [
  'linear-gradient(135deg,#c9965a,#a07040)',
  'linear-gradient(135deg,#7b5ea7,#5a3f80)',
  'linear-gradient(135deg,#5a9e7a,#3d7a58)',
  'linear-gradient(135deg,#c97a8a,#a05060)',
  'linear-gradient(135deg,#5a7ab5,#3a5a90)',
  'linear-gradient(135deg,#b5853a,#8a6020)',
];

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PRODUCTS — load from Supabase or fallback
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
async function loadProducts() {
  if (!DB_READY) { renderProducts(); return; }
  try {
    const { data, error } = await sb.from('products').select('*').order('display_order');
    if (error || !data || !data.length) { renderProducts(); return; }
    PRODUCTS = data.map(p => ({
      id:            p.id,
      name:          p.name,
      desc:          p.description,
      price:         p.price,
      originalPrice: p.original_price,
      badge:         p.badge || '',
      badgeClass:    p.badge_class || '',
      colors:        typeof p.colors === 'string' ? JSON.parse(p.colors) : (p.colors || []),
    }));
    renderProducts();
  } catch(e) { renderProducts(); }
}

function renderProducts() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('productsGrid');
  if (!PRODUCTS.length) {
    grid.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--muted);grid-column:1/-1;text-align:center;padding:2rem;">No products. Add one in Admin.</p>';
    return;
  }
  grid.innerHTML = PRODUCTS.map(p => {
    if (selectedColors[p.id] === undefined) selectedColors[p.id] = 0;
    const idx = selectedColors[p.id];
    const col = p.colors[idx] || p.colors[0];
    const inStock = col && col.stock > 0;
    return `<div class="product-card">
      <div class="product-img-wrap">
        ${p.badge ? `<span class="product-badge ${p.badgeClass}">${p.badge}</span>` : ''}
        <img src="${col?.img||''}" alt="${p.name}" onerror="this.parentElement.style.background='#f5ede4'"/>
      </div>
      <div class="product-info">
        <div class="product-name">${p.name}</div>
        <div class="product-desc">${p.desc}</div>
        <div class="color-label">Color: <strong>${col?.name||''}</strong></div>
        <div class="color-swatches">${p.colors.map((c,i)=>`<div class="swatch ${i===idx?'active':''}" style="background:${c.hex};opacity:${c.stock===0?0.3:1};" title="${c.name}${c.stock===0?' (Out of stock)':''}" onclick="selectColor(${p.id},${i})"></div>`).join('')}</div>
        <div class="product-footer">
          <div>
            <div class="price-row">
              <span class="price">$${p.price}</span>
              ${p.originalPrice ? `<span class="price-original">$${p.originalPrice}</span><span class="sale-tag">SALE</span>` : ''}
            </div>
            ${!inStock?'<div class="out-of-stock-tag">Out of stock</div>':''}
          </div>
          <button class="add-btn" onclick="addToCart(${p.id})" ${!inStock?'disabled style="opacity:0.35;cursor:not-allowed;"':''}>+</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function selectColor(pid, idx) { selectedColors[pid] = idx; renderProducts(); }

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CART
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function addToCart(pid) {
  const p = PRODUCTS.find(x => x.id === pid);
  const ci = selectedColors[pid] || 0;
  const col = p.colors[ci];
  if (!col || col.stock === 0) { showToast('⚠ Out of stock'); return; }
  const key = `${pid}-${col.name}`;
  const ex = cart.find(c => c.key === key);
  if (ex) ex.qty++;
  else cart.push({ key, pid, colorName: col.name, colorHex: col.hex, colorImg: col.img || '', qty: 1, name: p.name, price: p.price });
  updateCartUI();
  showToast(`✓ ${p.name} (${col.name}) added`);
}
function removeFromCart(key) { cart = cart.filter(c => c.key !== key); updateCartUI(); }
function changeQty(key, d) { const it = cart.find(c => c.key === key); if (!it) return; it.qty += d; if (it.qty <= 0) removeFromCart(key); else updateCartUI(); }

function updateCartUI() {
  const total = cart.reduce((s, c) => s + c.qty, 0);
  document.getElementById('cartCount').textContent = total;
  const itemsEl = document.getElementById('cartItems');
  const codForm = document.getElementById('codForm');
  const conf = document.getElementById('orderConfirm');
  conf.classList.remove('show'); conf.style.display = 'none';
  if (cart.length === 0) {
    itemsEl.innerHTML = `<div class="cart-empty"><div class="empty-icon">🛍</div><p>Your cart is empty.<br>Add a product to get started.</p></div>`;
    codForm.style.display = 'none';
  } else {
    itemsEl.innerHTML = cart.map(c => `<div class="cart-item">
      <img class="cart-item-img" src="${c.colorImg}" alt="${c.name}" onerror="this.style.background='#f5ede4';this.removeAttribute('src')"/>
      <div class="cart-item-info">
        <div class="cart-item-name">${c.name}</div>
        <div class="cart-item-variant"><span style="width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:50%;background:${c.colorHex};display:inline-block;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1);"></span>${c.colorName}</div>
        <div class="cart-item-price">$${c.price} each</div>
        <div class="cart-item-controls">
          <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty('${c.key}',-1)">−</button>
          <span class="qty-num">${c.qty}</span>
          <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty('${c.key}',1)">+</button>
          <button class="cart-remove" onclick="removeFromCart('${c.key}')">Remove</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');
    const sub = cart.reduce((s, c) => s + c.price * c.qty, 0);
    document.getElementById('cartSubtotal').textContent = `$${sub}`;
    document.getElementById('cartTotal').textContent = `$${sub + DELIVERY_FEE}`;
    codForm.style.display = 'block';
  }
}
function toggleCart() { document.getElementById('cartSidebar').classList.toggle('open'); document.getElementById('cartOverlay').classList.toggle('open'); }

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ORDER — saves to Supabase + Google Sheets + WhatsApp
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
async function placeOrder() {
  const name    = document.getElementById('codName').value.trim();
  const phone   = document.getElementById('codPhone').value.trim();
  const address = document.getElementById('codAddress').value.trim();
  const city    = document.getElementById('codCity').value;
  if (!name || !phone || !address || !city) { showToast('⚠ Please fill all required fields'); return; }

  const btn = document.querySelector('.checkout-btn');
  btn.textContent = 'Placing order...'; btn.disabled = true;

  const sub = cart.reduce((s, c) => s + c.price * c.qty, 0);
  const orderId = Date.now();
  const order = {
    id:       orderId,
    customer: name,
    phone,
    address:  `${address}, ${city}`,
    notes:    document.getElementById('codNotes').value,
    items:    cart.map(c => `${c.name} — ${c.colorName} x${c.qty}`).join(' | '),
    subtotal: sub,
    delivery: DELIVERY_FEE,
    total:    sub + DELIVERY_FEE,
    status:   'pending',
  };

  // 1. Save to Supabase (visible in admin from any device)
  if (DB_READY) {
    await sb.from('orders').insert(order).catch(() => {});
  }

  // 2. Send to Google Sheets
  fetch(GAS_WEBHOOK, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(order) }).catch(() => {});

  // 3. WhatsApp notification to you
  const msg = encodeURIComponent(`🛍 NEW STRANDLAB ORDER!\n\n👤 ${name}\n📞 ${phone}\n📍 ${order.address}\n🛒 ${order.items}\n💰 Total: $${order.total} (incl. $3 delivery)${order.notes ? '\n📝 ' + order.notes : ''}`);
  setTimeout(() => window.open(`https://wa.me/${STORE_WA_NUMBER}?text=${msg}`, '_blank'), 600);

  // Reset
  btn.textContent = 'Place Order — Cash on Delivery 🚚'; btn.disabled = false;
  document.getElementById('waShareBtn').onclick = () => {
    const m = encodeURIComponent(`Hi StrandLab! 👋\nOrder: ${order.items}\nTotal: $${order.total}\nAddress: ${order.address}`);
    window.open(`https://wa.me/?text=${m}`, '_blank');
  };
  document.getElementById('codForm').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('cartItems').innerHTML = '';
  const conf = document.getElementById('orderConfirm');
  conf.style.display = 'flex'; conf.classList.add('show');
  cart = []; document.getElementById('cartCount').textContent = '0';
}

function resetAfterOrder() {
  document.getElementById('orderConfirm').classList.remove('show');
  document.getElementById('orderConfirm').style.display = 'none';
  ['codName','codPhone','codAddress','codNotes'].forEach(id => document.getElementById(id).value = '');
  document.getElementById('codCity').value = '';
  updateCartUI(); toggleCart();
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// REVIEWS — stored in Supabase, visible to all when approved
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
async function loadReviews() {
  const grid    = document.getElementById('reviewsGrid');
  const summary = document.getElementById('reviewsSummary');
  if (!DB_READY) { renderReviewsFallback(grid, summary); return; }
  try {
    const { data } = await sb.from('reviews').select('*').eq('approved', true).order('created_at', { ascending: false });
    if (!data || !data.length) { renderReviewsFallback(grid, summary); return; }
    const avg = (data.reduce((s, r) => s + r.stars, 0) / data.length).toFixed(1);
    const fs = Math.round(avg);
    summary.innerHTML = `<div class="reviews-avg">${avg}</div><div><div class="reviews-avg-stars">${'★'.repeat(fs)}${'☆'.repeat(5-fs)}</div><div class="reviews-avg-count">${data.length} verified review${data.length!==1?'s':''}</div></div>`;
    grid.innerHTML = data.map(r => `
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">${'★'.repeat(r.stars)}${'☆'.repeat(5-r.stars)}</div>
        <div class="review-text">"${r.review_text}"</div>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar" style="background:${r.avatar_color||AVATAR_COLORS[0]};">${r.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">${r.name}<span class="review-verified">✓ Verified</span></div>
            <div class="review-meta">${r.city?r.city+' 🇱🇧 · ':''}${r.color?r.color+' brush · ':''}${new Date(r.created_at).toLocaleDateString('en-GB')}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>`).join('');
  } catch(e) { renderReviewsFallback(grid, summary); }
}

function renderReviewsFallback(grid, summary) {
  grid.innerHTML = `<div style="grid-column:1/-1;text-align:center;padding:2rem 0;"><p style="color:rgba(250,247,242,0.4);font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:300;">No reviews yet — be the first to share your experience!</p></div>`;
  summary.innerHTML = '';
}

function setStars(n) {
  selectedStars = n;
  document.querySelectorAll('#starPicker span').forEach((s, i) => s.classList.toggle('active', i < n));
}

async function submitReview() {
  const name  = document.getElementById('revName').value.trim();
  const text  = document.getElementById('revText').value.trim();
  const city  = document.getElementById('revCity').value.trim();
  const color = document.getElementById('revColor').value;
  if (!name)            { showToast('⚠ Please enter your name'); return; }
  if (!selectedStars)   { showToast('⚠ Please select a star rating'); return; }
  if (text.length < 10) { showToast('⚠ Please write at least a sentence'); return; }

  const btn = document.querySelector('.submit-review-btn');
  btn.textContent = 'Submitting...'; btn.disabled = true;

  const review = {
    name,
    city,
    color,
    stars: selectedStars,
    review_text: text,
    avatar_color: AVATAR_COLORS[Math.floor(Math.random() * AVATAR_COLORS.length)],
    approved: false,
  };

  if (DB_READY) {
    const { error } = await sb.from('reviews').insert(review);
    if (error) { showToast('⚠ Could not submit, try again'); btn.textContent = 'Submit Review ✦'; btn.disabled = false; return; }
  } else {
    // Fallback: send via WhatsApp if no Supabase
    const stars = '★'.repeat(selectedStars)+'☆'.repeat(5-selectedStars);
    const msg = encodeURIComponent(`⭐ NEW REVIEW — StrandLab\n\nName: ${name}${city?' — '+city:''}\nColor: ${color||'not specified'}\nRating: ${stars}\n\n"${text}"`);
    window.open(`https://wa.me/${STORE_WA_NUMBER}?text=${msg}`, '_blank');
  }

  // Notify admin via WhatsApp
  const stars = '★'.repeat(selectedStars)+'☆'.repeat(5-selectedStars);
  const msg = encodeURIComponent(`⭐ NEW REVIEW — StrandLab\n\n${name}${city?' ('+city+')':''}\n${stars}\n\n"${text}"\n\n👉 Log into Admin to approve it`);
  setTimeout(() => window.open(`https://wa.me/${STORE_WA_NUMBER}?text=${msg}`, '_blank'), 400);

  document.getElementById('revName').value = '';
  document.getElementById('revText').value = '';
  document.getElementById('revCity').value = '';
  document.getElementById('revColor').value = '';
  selectedStars = 0; setStars(0);
  btn.textContent = 'Submit Review ✦'; btn.disabled = false;
  showToast('✓ Review submitted — it will appear once approved!');
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ADMIN AUTH
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function promptAdmin() {
  if (adminLoggedIn) { openAdmin(); return; }
  document.getElementById('adminLoginOverlay').classList.add('open');
  document.getElementById('adminPwdInput').value = '';
  document.getElementById('loginError').style.display = 'none';
  setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('adminPwdInput').focus(), 150);
}
function checkAdminPwd() {
  const stored = localStorage.getItem('sl_admin_pwd') || DEFAULT_PASSWORD;
  if (document.getElementById('adminPwdInput').value === stored) {
    adminLoggedIn = true;
    document.getElementById('adminLoginOverlay').classList.remove('open');
    openAdmin();
  } else {
    document.getElementById('loginError').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('adminPwdInput').value = '';
  }
}
function closeAdminLogin() { document.getElementById('adminLoginOverlay').classList.remove('open'); }
function logoutAdmin() { adminLoggedIn = false; closeAdmin(); showToast('Logged out'); }
function changePassword() {
  const p1 = document.getElementById('newPwd1').value;
  const p2 = document.getElementById('newPwd2').value;
  if (!p1) { showToast('⚠ Password cannot be empty'); return; }
  if (p1 !== p2) { showToast('⚠ Passwords do not match'); return; }
  localStorage.setItem('sl_admin_pwd', p1);
  document.getElementById('newPwd1').value = '';
  document.getElementById('newPwd2').value = '';
  document.getElementById('pwdForm').style.display = 'none';
  showToast('✓ Password updated');
}
function togglePwdForm() { const f = document.getElementById('pwdForm'); f.style.display = f.style.display === 'none' ? 'block' : 'none'; }

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ADMIN PANEL
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
async function openAdmin() {
  document.getElementById('adminPanel').classList.add('open');
  document.getElementById('adminOverlay').classList.add('open');
  document.getElementById('adminWaNum').value = localStorage.getItem('sl_wa_num') || '';
  document.getElementById('adminWebhook').value = SUPABASE_URL ? `Supabase connected ✓ — ${SUPABASE_URL}` : 'Supabase not connected yet';
  document.getElementById('socialWa').value = localStorage.getItem('sl_social_wa') || '';
  document.getElementById('socialIg').value = localStorage.getItem('sl_social_ig') || '';
  document.getElementById('socialTt').value = localStorage.getItem('sl_social_tt') || '';
  document.getElementById('socialFb').value = localStorage.getItem('sl_social_fb') || '';
  await renderAdminOrders();
  await renderAdminReviews();
  renderAdminProducts();
  if (DB_READY) setupRealtimeOrders();
}
function closeAdmin() { document.getElementById('adminPanel').classList.remove('open'); document.getElementById('adminOverlay').classList.remove('open'); }
function saveNotifSettings() { localStorage.setItem('sl_wa_num', document.getElementById('adminWaNum').value.trim()); showToast('✓ Settings saved'); }

// Real-time order notifications (when admin panel is open)
let realtimeSub = null;
function setupRealtimeOrders() {
  if (!DB_READY || realtimeSub) return;
  realtimeSub = sb.channel('orders-channel')
    .on('postgres_changes', { event: 'INSERT', schema: 'public', table: 'orders' }, payload => {
      const o = payload.new;
      showAdminNotif(`🛍 New order from ${o.customer} — $${o.total}`);
      renderAdminOrders();
      // Browser notification
      if (Notification.permission === 'granted') {
        new Notification('New StrandLab Order! 🛍', { body: `${o.customer} — ${o.items} — $${o.total}`, icon: '' });
      }
    })
    .subscribe();
}

function showAdminNotif(msg) {
  let notif = document.getElementById('adminNotifBanner');
  if (!notif) {
    notif = document.createElement('div');
    notif.id = 'adminNotifBanner';
    notif.style.cssText = 'position:sticky;top:0;z-index:10;background:var(--gold);color:white;padding:0.8rem 1.5rem;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:600;text-align:center;border-radius:0;cursor:pointer;';
    notif.onclick = () => notif.remove();
    document.querySelector('.admin-body').prepend(notif);
  }
  notif.textContent = msg + ' — tap to dismiss';
}

async function clearOrders() {
  if (!confirm('Delete all orders from the database?')) return;
  if (DB_READY) await sb.from('orders').delete().neq('id', 0).catch(() => {});
  await renderAdminOrders();
  showToast('Orders cleared');
}

async function renderAdminOrders() {
  const el = document.getElementById('adminOrders');
  if (!DB_READY) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="no-orders">Connect Supabase to see orders from all devices.</div>'; return; }
  el.innerHTML = '<div class="no-orders" style="text-align:center;padding:1rem;">Loading orders...</div>';
  try {
    const { data } = await sb.from('orders').select('*').order('id', { ascending: false }).limit(50);
    if (!data || !data.length) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="no-orders">No orders yet.</div>'; return; }
    el.innerHTML = data.map(o => `
      <div class="order-row">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.4rem;">
          <strong>#${String(o.id).slice(-5)}</strong> — ${o.customer}
          <span class="order-status" style="cursor:pointer;" onclick="cycleOrderStatus(${o.id}, this)">${o.status||'pending'}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="order-meta">📞 ${o.phone} | 📍 ${o.address} | 🕐 ${new Date(o.created_at||o.id).toLocaleString('en-GB')}</div>
        <div class="order-items-list">🛍 ${o.items}</div>
        <div class="order-meta">💰 $${o.subtotal} + $3 delivery = <strong>$${o.total}</strong></div>
        ${o.notes ? `<div class="order-meta">📝 ${o.notes}</div>` : ''}
      </div>`).join('');
  } catch(e) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="no-orders">Error loading orders.</div>'; }
}

async function cycleOrderStatus(id, el) {
  const statuses = ['pending', 'confirmed', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled'];
  const colors   = { pending:'#fff3e0', confirmed:'#e3f2fd', shipped:'#f3e5f5', delivered:'#e8f5e9', cancelled:'#ffebee' };
  const textcols = { pending:'#e65100', confirmed:'#0277bd', shipped:'#6a1b9a', delivered:'#2e7d32', cancelled:'#c62828' };
  const curr = el.textContent.trim();
  const next = statuses[(statuses.indexOf(curr) + 1) % statuses.length];
  if (DB_READY) await sb.from('orders').update({ status: next }).eq('id', id).catch(() => {});
  el.textContent = next;
  el.style.background = colors[next] || '#fff3e0';
  el.style.color = textcols[next] || '#e65100';
}

async function renderAdminReviews() {
  const el = document.getElementById('adminReviews');
  const badge = document.getElementById('pendingBadge');
  if (!DB_READY) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="no-orders">Connect Supabase to manage reviews from all devices.</div>'; return; }
  el.innerHTML = '<div class="no-orders" style="text-align:center;padding:1rem;">Loading reviews...</div>';
  try {
    const { data } = await sb.from('reviews').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false });
    const pending = data ? data.filter(r => !r.approved).length : 0;
    if (badge) badge.textContent = pending ? `${pending} pending` : '';
    if (!data || !data.length) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="no-orders">No reviews submitted yet.</div>'; return; }
    el.innerHTML = data.map(r => `
      <div class="order-row" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.3rem;">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.4rem;">
          <strong>${r.name}${r.city?' — '+r.city:''}</strong>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:0.5rem;align-items:center;">
            <span style="color:var(--gold);font-size:0.85rem;">${'★'.repeat(r.stars)}</span>
            ${r.approved
              ? `<span style="background:#e8f5e9;color:#2e7d32;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.2rem 0.6rem;border-radius:100px;">Live ✓</span>
                 <button onclick="toggleReviewApproval(${r.id}, false, this)" style="background:none;border:1px solid #ccc;color:#999;font-size:0.7rem;padding:0.2rem 0.5rem;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;">Hide</button>`
              : `<button onclick="toggleReviewApproval(${r.id}, true, this)" style="background:#e8f5e9;color:#2e7d32;border:none;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.25rem 0.7rem;border-radius:100px;cursor:pointer;">✓ Approve</button>`}
            <button onclick="deleteReview(${r.id})" style="background:none;border:none;color:#ccc;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.85rem;">🗑</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="order-meta" style="font-style:italic;">"${r.review_text}"</div>
        <div class="order-meta">${r.color?r.color+' brush · ':''}${new Date(r.created_at).toLocaleDateString('en-GB')}</div>
      </div>`).join('');
  } catch(e) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="no-orders">Error loading reviews.</div>'; }
}

async function toggleReviewApproval(id, approve, btn) {
  if (!DB_READY) return;
  await sb.from('reviews').update({ approved: approve }).eq('id', id);
  showToast(approve ? '✓ Review is now live for everyone!' : 'Review hidden');
  await loadReviews();
  await renderAdminReviews();
}

async function deleteReview(id) {
  if (!confirm('Delete this review permanently?')) return;
  if (DB_READY) await sb.from('reviews').delete().eq('id', id);
  await loadReviews();
  await renderAdminReviews();
  showToast('Review deleted');
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ADMIN — PRODUCTS (save to Supabase → visible to everyone)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function renderAdminProducts() {
  document.getElementById('adminProductsList').innerHTML = PRODUCTS.map((p, pi) => `
    <div class="admin-product-block">
      <h4><span>Product ${pi+1}</span><button class="delete-product-btn" onclick="deleteProduct(${pi})">🗑 Delete</button></h4>
      <div class="admin-row">
        <div class="admin-field"><label>Name</label><input type="text" id="ap-name-${pi}" value="${p.name}"/></div>
        <div class="admin-field"><label>Sale Price ($)</label><input type="number" id="ap-price-${pi}" value="${p.price}" min="0"/></div>
      </div>
      <div class="admin-row">
        <div class="admin-field"><label>Original Price (crossed out)</label><input type="number" id="ap-origprice-${pi}" value="${p.originalPrice||''}" min="0" placeholder="Leave blank if no sale"/></div>
        <div class="admin-field"><label>Badge Text</label><input type="text" id="ap-badge-${pi}" value="${p.badge||''}" placeholder="e.g. On Sale"/></div>
      </div>
      <div class="admin-row">
        <div class="admin-field full"><label>Description</label><input type="text" id="ap-desc-${pi}" value="${p.desc||''}"/></div>
      </div>
      <div class="admin-row">
        <div class="admin-field"><label>Badge Style</label><select id="ap-badgeclass-${pi}"><option value="" ${p.badgeClass===''?'selected':''}>Dark</option><option value="gold" ${p.badgeClass==='gold'?'selected':''}>Gold</option></select></div>
      </div>
      <div class="colors-editor">
        <label>Colors, Images & Stock</label>
        <div class="colors-hint">For each color: pick color → name → stock qty → paste image URL or base64</div>
        <div id="ap-colors-${pi}">${(p.colors||[]).map((c,ci)=>colorRowHTML(pi,ci,c)).join('')}</div>
        <button class="add-color-btn" onclick="addColorRow(${pi})">+ Add color</button>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function colorRowHTML(pi, ci, c) {
  return `<div class="color-row">
    <div class="color-row-top">
      <input type="color" value="${c.hex||'#cccccc'}" id="cr-hex-${pi}-${ci}"/>
      <input type="text" placeholder="Color name" value="${c.name||''}" id="cr-name-${pi}-${ci}"/>
      <input type="number" min="0" value="${c.stock||0}" id="cr-stock-${pi}-${ci}" title="Stock"/>
      <button class="remove-color" onclick="removeColorRow(${pi},${ci})">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="color-img-row">
      <input type="text" placeholder="Image URL or paste base64 (data:image/...)" id="cr-img-${pi}-${ci}" oninput="previewColorImg(${pi},${ci})"/>
      <img id="cr-prev-${pi}-${ci}" class="color-img-preview" onerror="this.style.display='none'"/>
    </div>
  </div>`;
}

function previewColorImg(pi, ci) {
  const v = document.getElementById(`cr-img-${pi}-${ci}`).value;
  const img = document.getElementById(`cr-prev-${pi}-${ci}`);
  if (v.length > 10) { img.src = v; img.style.display = 'block'; }
}
function addColorRow(pi) { PRODUCTS[pi].colors.push({ name:'', hex:'#cccccc', stock:0, img:'' }); renderAdminProducts(); }
function removeColorRow(pi, ci) { if (PRODUCTS[pi].colors.length <= 1) { showToast('⚠ Need at least 1 color'); return; } PRODUCTS[pi].colors.splice(ci, 1); renderAdminProducts(); }
function deleteProduct(pi) { if (!confirm('Delete this product?')) return; PRODUCTS.splice(pi, 1); renderAdminProducts(); }
function addProductBlock() { PRODUCTS.push({ id: Date.now(), name:'New Product', desc:'Description', price:27, originalPrice:null, badge:'', badgeClass:'', colors:[{name:'Pink',hex:'#f0b8c0',stock:1,img:''}] }); renderAdminProducts(); }

async function saveAdminChanges() {
  const btn = document.querySelector('.admin-save-btn');
  btn.textContent = 'Saving...'; btn.disabled = true;

  PRODUCTS.forEach((p, pi) => {
    p.name          = document.getElementById(`ap-name-${pi}`)?.value || p.name;
    p.price         = parseFloat(document.getElementById(`ap-price-${pi}`)?.value) || p.price;
    const orig      = document.getElementById(`ap-origprice-${pi}`)?.value;
    p.originalPrice = orig && parseFloat(orig) > 0 ? parseFloat(orig) : null;
    p.desc          = document.getElementById(`ap-desc-${pi}`)?.value || p.desc;
    p.badge         = document.getElementById(`ap-badge-${pi}`)?.value ?? p.badge;
    p.badgeClass    = document.getElementById(`ap-badgeclass-${pi}`)?.value ?? p.badgeClass;
    p.colors.forEach((c, ci) => {
      const n = document.getElementById(`cr-name-${pi}-${ci}`);
      const h = document.getElementById(`cr-hex-${pi}-${ci}`);
      const s = document.getElementById(`cr-stock-${pi}-${ci}`);
      const img = document.getElementById(`cr-img-${pi}-${ci}`);
      if (n) c.name  = n.value;
      if (h) c.hex   = h.value;
      if (s) c.stock = parseInt(s.value) || 0;
      if (img && img.value.trim()) c.img = img.value.trim();
    });
  });

  if (DB_READY) {
    // Upsert all products to Supabase — all users see changes instantly
    for (const p of PRODUCTS) {
      const row = {
        id:             typeof p.id === 'number' && p.id < 1e10 ? p.id : undefined,
        name:           p.name,
        description:    p.desc,
        price:          p.price,
        original_price: p.originalPrice,
        badge:          p.badge,
        badge_class:    p.badgeClass,
        colors:         p.colors,
        display_order:  PRODUCTS.indexOf(p),
      };
      if (row.id && row.id < 1e10) {
        await sb.from('products').upsert(row).catch(() => {});
      } else {
        const { data } = await sb.from('products').insert({ ...row, id: undefined }).select().catch(() => ({ data: null }));
        if (data && data[0]) p.id = data[0].id;
      }
    }
    showToast('✓ Saved to database — all users see changes now!');
  } else {
    showToast('✓ Saved locally (connect Supabase for global changes)');
  }

  selectedColors = {};
  renderProducts();
  btn.textContent = '💾 Save All Changes'; btn.disabled = false;
  closeAdmin();
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SOCIAL LINKS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function saveSocialLinks() {
  localStorage.setItem('sl_social_wa', document.getElementById('socialWa').value.trim());
  localStorage.setItem('sl_social_ig', document.getElementById('socialIg').value.trim());
  localStorage.setItem('sl_social_tt', document.getElementById('socialTt').value.trim());
  localStorage.setItem('sl_social_fb', document.getElementById('socialFb').value.trim());
  renderSocialFooter(); updateWaFloat();
  showToast('✓ Social links saved');
}

function renderSocialFooter() {
  const el = document.getElementById('footerSocialLinks');
  if (!el) return;
  const waNum = (localStorage.getItem('sl_social_wa') || STORE_WA_NUMBER).replace(/[^0-9]/g,'');
  const ig = localStorage.getItem('sl_social_ig') || STORE_IG_URL;
  const tt = localStorage.getItem('sl_social_tt') || STORE_TT_URL;
  const fb = localStorage.getItem('sl_social_fb') || STORE_FB_URL;
  const icons = {
    wa:`<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>`,
    ig:`<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zM12 0C8.741 0 8.333.014 7.053.072 2.695.272.273 2.69.073 7.052.014 8.333 0 8.741 0 12c0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98C8.333 23.986 8.741 24 12 24c3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98C15.668.014 15.259 0 12 0zm0 5.838a6.162 6.162 0 100 12.324 6.162 6.162 0 000-12.324zM12 16a4 4 0 110-8 4 4 0 010 8zm6.406-11.845a1.44 1.44 0 100 2.881 1.44 1.44 0 000-2.881z"/></svg>`,
    tt:`<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12.525.02c1.31-.02 2.61-.01 3.91-.02.08 1.53.63 3.09 1.75 4.17 1.12 1.11 2.7 1.62 4.24 1.79v4.03c-1.44-.05-2.89-.35-4.2-.97-.57-.26-1.1-.59-1.62-.93-.01 2.92.01 5.84-.02 8.75-.08 1.4-.54 2.79-1.35 3.94-1.31 1.92-3.58 3.17-5.91 3.21-1.43.08-2.86-.31-4.08-1.03-2.02-1.19-3.44-3.37-3.65-5.71-.02-.5-.03-1-.01-1.49.18-1.9 1.12-3.72 2.58-4.96 1.66-1.44 3.98-2.13 6.15-1.72.02 1.48-.04 2.96-.04 4.44-.99-.32-2.15-.23-3.02.37-.63.41-1.11 1.04-1.36 1.75-.21.51-.15 1.07-.14 1.61.24 1.64 1.82 3.02 3.5 2.87 1.12-.01 2.19-.66 2.77-1.61.19-.33.4-.67.41-1.06.1-1.79.06-3.57.07-5.36.01-4.03-.01-8.05.02-12.07z"/></svg>`,
    fb:`<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M24 12.073c0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12s-12 5.373-12 12c0 5.99 4.388 10.954 10.125 11.854v-8.385H7.078v-3.47h3.047V9.43c0-3.007 1.792-4.669 4.533-4.669 1.312 0 2.686.235 2.686.235v2.953H15.83c-1.491 0-1.956.925-1.956 1.874v2.25h3.328l-.532 3.47h-2.796v8.385C19.612 23.027 24 18.062 24 12.073z"/></svg>`,
  };
  const links = [
    waNum?{href:`https://wa.me/${waNum}`,icon:icons.wa,title:'WhatsApp'}:null,
    ig   ?{href:ig,icon:icons.ig,title:'Instagram'}:null,
    tt   ?{href:tt,icon:icons.tt,title:'TikTok'}:null,
    fb   ?{href:fb,icon:icons.fb,title:'Facebook'}:null,
  ].filter(Boolean);
  el.innerHTML = links.length
    ? links.map(l=>`<a href="${l.href}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="social-link" title="${l.title}">${l.icon}</a>`).join('')
    : `<span style="color:rgba(250,247,242,0.25);font-size:0.78rem;">Links coming soon</span>`;
}

function updateWaFloat() {
  const btn = document.getElementById('waFloatBtn');
  if (btn) btn.style.display = 'flex';
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// FAQ
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function toggleFaq(btn) {
  const item = btn.closest('.faq-item');
  const isOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
  document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item.open').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('open'));
  if (!isOpen) item.classList.add('open');
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// WHATSAPP CHAT BUTTON
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function openWaChat() {
  const msg = encodeURIComponent('Hi StrandLab! 👋 I have a question about the wireless brush.');
  window.open(`https://wa.me/${STORE_WA_NUMBER}?text=${msg}`, '_blank');
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// TOAST
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function showToast(msg) { const t = document.getElementById('toast'); t.textContent = msg; t.classList.add('show'); setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 2800); }

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// BROWSER NOTIFICATIONS PERMISSION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function requestNotifPermission() {
  if ('Notification' in window && Notification.permission === 'default') {
    Notification.requestPermission();
  }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// INIT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
loadProducts();
updateCartUI();
loadReviews();
renderSocialFooter();
updateWaFloat();
setStars(0);
if (!DB_READY) console.warn('Supabase not configured — running in local mode. Add SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON to enable global data.');
</script>
</body>
</html>
